programmes.show_description: From Meatballs To Lollipops. Guy Fieri gets into a festival of flavours. In Salt Lake City, a New Jersey native serves up Italian family recipes like the huge ten-ounce meatball! S19, Ep7
Cross Country Comfort Food. Guy Fieri seeks comfort food from the slopes to the sea. In Utah, a local boy serves a gourmet chivito club and a ski lodge dishes out crispy pork belly. S19, Ep8
Omaha. Adam heads to Omaha, Nebraska where he samples the famous Godfather sandwich at Amato's Café. Later he guides Matt through the Pig Wing Challenge, but will he succeed? S1, Ep22
Oahu. Adam heads to Oahu, where he tries a Chicago style frank with a Hawaiian twist. Later, he guides Lauren through The Moose Omelette Challenge, but will she succeed? S1, Ep24
Holly Jolly Hoboken and Ugly Sweaters. It's the holiday season, and team makes a cake for the New York Botanical Garden train show. Plus, the team creates an 'ugly sweater' cake. S9, Ep17
Piñata Party And Gender Reveal. Buddy is challenged to create a piñata cake by two 11-year-old DJs. Plus, two expectant mothers order gender-reveal cakes - will it be pink or blue? S9, Ep18

With the rising cost of food and energy, Jamie Oliver is on a mission to make delicious dishes that won't break the budget. S1, Ep2
North Yorkshire. Si and Dave ride through the North York Moors National Park. They meet the UK's youngest Michelin-star winning chef, an award-winning beekeeper and a local forager. S1, Ep4
Meg's Getting Married. Ree Drummond recreates a Tex-Mex dish from a friend's engagement party. She makes crispy cerveza battered fish and prickly pear margaritas. S23, Ep11
Thanksgiving Potluck. Ree Drummond showcases her Thanksgiving favourites in fantastic fashion. For the main dish she cooks an amazing glazed ham and for dessert a pumpkin rum cake. S23, Ep12
Fishcakes, Linguine, Lamb Chops. Jamie Oliver cooks up quick Asian fishcakes with a sweet and spicy glaze. Then, he serves up lemon and courgette linguine and sticky lamb chops. S1, Ep3
Lamb, Spaghetti, Fish, Cookies. Jamie cooks tender lamb shoulder with an easy cheat for maximum flavour. Plus, he prepares his speedy veggie spaghetti and apple crumble cookies. S1, Ep4
Off Duty. Ina sees what professional cooks make at home when they're off duty. Recipes include banana raspberry smoothies and kimchi fried rice with fried egg. S7, Ep7
Restaurant Rules. Ina shares restaurant-inspired dishes and secrets from America's best kitchens. On the menu are peas and prosciutto, lemon chicken and skillet brownies. S7, Ep8
In week three, the remaining ten bakers get ready to brave bread. The boys are confident that this is their week, but the girls have other ideas. S5, Ep3
Having seen the bakers make cake, biscuits and bread, Mary and Paul up the ante - for the first time, we see how the bakers cope with multitasking across several baking skills at once. S5, Ep4
James heads to the riverside town of Isle Sur La Sorge, where his food hero, Keith Floyd, once owned a restaurant. He cooks peaches pain perdu in the sunshine. S1, Ep15
James travels to Normandy, home to his all-time favourite ingredient, butter! He cooks up artichokes with hollandaise whilst visiting a Calvados orchard. S1, Ep16

Having seen the bakers make cake, biscuits and bread, Mary and Paul up the ante - for the first time, we see how the bakers cope with multitasking across several baking skills at once. S5, Ep4
Best Of City Bakes - Amazing Bakers. Paul Hollywood showcases some of the most inspirational characters that opened his eyes to the depth of baking heritage. S1, Ep12
Best Of City Bakes - Incredible Bakeries. Paul looks back over his journey around the globe and showcases some of his favourite moments spent with the bakers themselves. S1, Ep13
With the rising cost of food and energy, Jamie Oliver is on a mission to make delicious dishes that won't break the budget. S1, Ep2
International Family Style. Guy Fieri takes a seat at the family table! He checks out a sibling-run Vietnamese joint in Utah serving up mum's legendary recipes for authentic dishes. S19, Ep9
Island Flavor. Guy Fieri cruises round Hawaii for a taste of Oahu. A tiny cafe serves up modern twists on Hawaiian classics and an authentic Hawaiian drive-in cranks out fresh fish. S19, Ep10
Grillin', Chillin', Huli Huli. Guy Fieri checks out unique grills on the mainland and beyond. On the menu - classic Americana with a twist, unusual tacos and huli huli chicken. S19, Ep11
Righteous Bites. Guy Fieri checks out dishes on both sides of the Pacific. There are platefuls of guilty pleasures in LA and in Monterey, CA, a spot on the pier serves fresh fish. S19, Ep12
Charlotte. Adam tastes a four-tier cheeseburger and golden fried chicken in Charlotte. Plus, a college freshman takes on the Big Eats Challenge, 25 pulled pork sliders and fries! S2, Ep1
Jackson. Adam tries fall-off-the-bone BBQ and a comfort food buffet in Jackson. He also coaches a vegetarian through a three-patty hamburger and fries called the Whammy Challenge. S2, Ep2
Glass Cake and 100th Birthday. The team creates a sugar-craft cake to mimic beautiful glass art. And Lisa takes a special order for a family patriarch's 100th birthday. S9, Ep19
Father-Daughter Dance And Bachelorette Party. Mauro gets a very sweet cake order for a Father-Daughter dance. Buddy takes an order from a bride-to-be for her bachelorette party. S9, Ep20

Best Of City Bakes - Amazing Bakers. Paul Hollywood showcases some of the most inspirational characters that opened his eyes to the depth of baking heritage. S1, Ep12
Best Of City Bakes - Incredible Bakeries. Paul looks back over his journey around the globe and showcases some of his favourite moments spent with the bakers themselves. S1, Ep13
West Yorkshire. The Bikers continue their tour in West Yorkshire. They cook a full English shakshuka with some blueberry muffins, as well as curried crab cakes. S1, Ep5
Pie's The Limit. Ree Drummond is in the mood to create show-stopping pies. She shares a fantastical waffle cone ice cream pie and a decadent double chocolate pie. S23, Ep13
Double Care Package. Ree makes care packages for her daughters at college. She sends them homemade breakfast tarts, nut and seed brittle, salt and pepper crackers and cherry gummies. S22, Ep1
Beef, Crispy Squid, Polenta Cake. Jamie prepares high-speed Ginger Shakin' Beef with pak choi. Then, he makes crispy squid and smashed avocado, plus almond, orange and polenta cake. S1, Ep5
Pork Burger, Prawns, Gnocchi, Cheesecake. Jamie Oliver cooks pork burger, taking fast food to the next level! Later, he serves up sticky mango prawns and frozen banoffee cheesecake. S1, Ep6
Cheesy Does It. Ina gets cheesy in the kitchen! She prepares dishes including coconut cupcakes with cream cheese icing, roasted vegetable frittata and the ultimate grilled cheese. S7, Ep9
Back To Brooklyn. Ina and Jeffrey relive delicious memories with a trip to Brooklyn. They feast on potato latkes and homemade applesauce, and make Clam, Chilli and Parsley Pizza. S7, Ep10
Almost halfway through the Bake Off and the remaining bakers are facing pies and tarts. They are asked to bake a custard tart and a mini pear pie. S5, Ep5
Past halfway in their baking marathon and the remaining six bakers face three European cakes: a yeast-leavened cake, a Swedish princess torte and a dobos torte. S5, Ep6
James arrives in the tiny village of Giverny, known for its food and art. He explores Monet's kitchen and cooks up an autumnal treat of apple doughnuts. S1, Ep17
James ventures to Paris, one of his favourite cities in the world! He cooks duck breast with tangy vegetables, a steak baguette and gin and cucumber savarin. S1, Ep18

Northumberland. James samples the delights of Northumberland, joined by Michelin-starred chef Kenny Atkinson. They learn how mead is made on Holy Island. S1, Ep13
Isle of Man. James visits the Isle of Man during its famous TT warm-up week. He's joined by Michelin-starred chef and fellow petrolhead, Lisa Goodwin-Allen. S1, Ep14
Neighborhood Knockouts. Guy Fieri scours the US west coast for funky joints. An all-day breakfast joint serves up creme brûlée French toast and a hot dog spot features lamb merguez. S18, Ep1
Meat Lover's Paradise. Guy Fieri takes a meat-crazed master class with master butchers. He checks out a pastrami-loving eatery serving burgers and cheesesteaks. S18, Ep2
